title: Love Takes Flight

actors: Bruce Cabot, Beatrice Roberts, John Sheehan
plot: On a transcontinental flight from New York City to Los Angeles, Joan Lawson, the flight hostess, attracts the attention of a move producer, Dave Miller, and he tries to persuade her to sign a movie contract. She declines, as she i...
